name: generic_region_value
description: Example recipe that standardizes a converted microdata view into region, sample_weight, and target_value columns.

sources.label: Official IBGE dictionary or input layout used to choose variables

output.sql: select region, cast(sample_weight as double) as sample_weight, cast(raw_value as double) as target_value from microdata

validations.name: non_empty_output
validations.sql: select count(*) as row_count from harmonized_microdata
